words.def: a device in which something (usually an animal) can be caught and penned
words.zh: n. 圈套, 陷阱, 詭計, 存水彎

words.def: something determined in relation to something that includes it
words.zh: n. 部分, 區域性, 零件, 要素, 等分, 職責, 角色, 部位

words.def: the products of human creativity; works of art collectively
words.zh: n. 藝術, 人文科學, 技術, 巧妙, 詭計, 美術

words.def: the sound made by a gentle blow
